meaning: vt.花费,消耗,支出,[海]把(暂时不用的绳)绕在杆上
examples: If you give up exercise, your muscles shrink and fat increases. By the same token, if you expend more energy you will lose fat.
Growth, reproduction, and daily metabolism all require an organism to expend energy.
Extreme athletes expend lots of energy breaking down and repairing and building muscles.
Greater accountability, more expeditious decision-making and improved risk-benefit balancing would expend resources more efficiently.
The energy that male fish expend on courtship comes at the expense of their semen.
